title: PvP Toggle for fabric
body:
# PvP Toggle

PvP Toggle is a farbic mod meant for servers. You can use **/pvp** to toggle in and out of pvp.
Currently theres no permissions system but I can add more stuff later!

## 1.1 UPDATE:
Now, PvP Toggle has a config file! It's located in ~/config/pvptoggle.json
There you can customize stuff like command cooldown, minimum permission level etc.
